main.description: A versioned markdown RFC document. The body lives in separate documentVersion records; this record holds the title and a pointer to the current version.

title.description: Human-readable title shown in lists and headers.

createdAt.description: When the document was first created (does not change across versions).

currentVersion.description: Strong ref to the dev.disnet.atrfc.documentVersion record that represents the current head. Absent only transiently during initial creation, before the first version write completes.
